
# General Requirements

## E.G.1: macOS Target
<!--embedding:paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2:-->


The application must target macOS (OS X) as the primary supported platform.

## E.G.2: Electron App Initialization
<!--embedding:paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2:-->


Initialize a new Electron application with a working main process and renderer.

## E.G.3: Default Window
<!--embedding:paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2:-->


On launch, open a single main window with a default size and title.

## E.G.4: Local Dev Scripts
<!--embedding:paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2:-->


Provide npm scripts to run the app in development mode on macOS.

## E.G.5: Minimal UI
<!--embedding:paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2:-->


Render a minimal UI in the renderer that confirms the app is running.

## E.G.6: Electron Version
<!--embedding:paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2:-->


Use Electron v40.0.0 as the required version for this project.

## E.G.7: npm Version
<!--embedding:paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2:-->


Use npm v11.8.0 as the required package manager version.

## E.G.8: Node.js Version
<!--embedding:paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2:-->


Use Node.js v25.5.0 as the required runtime version for this project.

## E.G.9: Fullscreen on Launch
<!--embedding:paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2:-->

On launch, the main application window must open maximized, but not in fullscreen mode.
